Real DNS, Fetch, streams, Cheerio, Playwright, axe-core, files, processes, packages, containers, assistive-technology review, load, legal review, restore, and production behavior require explicit controlled transfer gates. Competency probe: Retain version lineage, supersession, disappearance, deletion, restoration, and report impact under retention policy.

For Authorized site auditing and TypeScript Defend the Version Tombstone model · Theory Version Tombsto…, challenge the documented misconception with runtime, failure, race, or toolchain evidence: Overwriting latest records is enough for audits and corrections.
